purpose: Prevent technically valid but visually near-static Archer Attack packages from passing review.

oldClearReference.evidence: Distinct source pose sequence with semantic roles raise_bow, nock_arrow, draw_mid, draw_full_tension, release, recoil_follow_through, follow_through_open_hand, return_to_ready.
oldClearReference.interpretation: Material silhouette and articulated-pose diversity is visible across the sequence.

rejectedV1.head: 390c288c90ee060bccba5f5a00aa673ed503d521
rejectedV1.interpretation: Unique hashes and measurable pixel deltas existed, but pose articulation and board-scale attack readability were insufficient.

A_poseDiversity.rule: Meaningful pose diversity must be demonstrated by silhouette and articulated limb geometry, not file-hash uniqueness or minor warps.
requiredKeyPoseDistinctions: frame006/007 follow-through vs frame009 neutral exit
A_poseDiversity.failure: If key frames look like the same neutral pose with small displacement, FAIL.

mustShow: shoulder rotation or clear shoulder-line change
drawing hand visibly travels backward during draw
evidence: annotated shoulder/elbow/hand landmarks for key frames
arm-region geometry/centroid measurements as secondary evidence
B_armArticulation.failure: Centroid/subpixel movement without visible joint articulation is insufficient.

C_bowDrawReadability.rule: Full draw must be immediately distinguishable from ready/neutral and read as a bow under tension.
mustShow: full-draw silhouette clearly distinct from neutral

D_releaseReadability.rule: Release must be a semantic pose change from full draw, not merely the largest pixel delta or a warp reset.
mustShow: release pose distinct from full-draw pose
D_releaseReadability.markerRule: projectileRelease must map to the actual visual release frame after pose review.

E_followThrough.rule: At least one post-release frame must visibly read as recoil/follow-through and remain distinct from both release and neutral.

F_boardScalePerceptual.rule: At gameplay scale, a viewer must identify the motion as 'Archer shoots a bow' from character motion alone, without relying on projectile, trail, impact VFX, labels, or marker overlays.
requiredHumanQuestions: เห็นยกธนูไหม
เห็นง้างสายไหม
เห็น full draw ชัดไหม
เห็นปล่อยลูกศรไหม
เห็น follow-through ไหม
ยังเป็น Archer ตัวเดิมไหม
ที่ board scale ยังอ่านออกไหม
F_boardScalePerceptual.hardRule: If questions 2 through 5 are not clearly YES, approval is forbidden.

required: silhouette width and shape change across key poses
changed-region bounding box between neutral/ready and full-draw
drawing-hand displacement across ready -> draw-mid -> full-draw -> release
arm-region centroid shift as secondary evidence
bow orientation or visible extent change where pose requires it
quantitativeReviewMetrics.thresholdPolicy: Do not invent arbitrary absolute thresholds without a stable baseline. Report normalized values and compare against both old CLEAR reference and rejected PR #67 NEAR_STATIC reference.
quantitativeReviewMetrics.comparativePassDirection: v2 must be materially closer to the old CLEAR articulated readability than to PR #67 near-static behavior.
quantitativeReviewMetrics.subpixelWobblePolicy: A metric set dominated by sub-pixel or approximately one-pixel board-scale changes cannot satisfy the visual gate even if hashes differ.
